prompt: I want to model an aggressive scenario: increase units to 75,000 in Year 1, drop the variable cost per unit to $35, and cut fixed costs to $800,000. Make all three changes and then tell me what happens to Year 2 Net Income.
assertions: Triggers recalculation via recalc_bridge.py (at least once after all writes)
Reports the result as the model's output, not an internal calculation
